subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Dawning-Place of the All-Merciful unto the oppressed ones in the land of Zanjan. By My life! The heavens have wept over what [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این نامه ایست از مطلع رحمن بسوی مظلومان ارض زنجان لعمری قد بکت السماء علی ما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Imam Husayn, @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom
